case_title: RODRIGUEZ, CARMEN JOAQUIN vs. SABILLON, RAUL A. et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, CARMEN JOAQUIN AS TO DEFENDANT SABILLON, RAUL A. GARCIA, JUSTO SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-04-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-05-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-17-1993
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-04-1993, CONTINUED TO SEP-13-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-13-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-13-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR OCT-28-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-28-1993, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-28-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-02-1993 CONTINUED FROM OCT-28-1993 TO DEC-02-1993 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-02-1993, OFF CALENDAR
